name: China Huarong Energy Company Limited
summary: China Huarong Energy Company Limited, an investment holding company, engages in the energy exploration and production businesses. The company explores for, produces, and sells crude oil. The company operates five oilfields in the Fergana Valley of the Republic of Kyrgyzstan; and sells petroleum products. It is also involved in commodity trading business. The company was formerly known as China Rongsheng Heavy Industries Group Holdings Limited and changed its name to China Huarong Energy Company Limited in April 2015. China Huarong Energy Company Limited was incorporated in 2010 and is based in Wan Chai, Hong Kong.
